merlin_thesis: NAS100 experienced a sharp -6.5% correction from ATH 30,808 (Jun 3) to SSL sweep low 28,822 today, driven by tech selloff, Iran war jitters, and rising yields. Deep SSL sweep with +632pt bounce suggests potential reversal, but short-term structure remains bearish (LH/LL, -DI > +DI). CPI report tomorrow (Jun 10) is a major risk event. Alfred MT5 offline — no H4/M15 OHLCV data available for full ICT pipeline. Recommendation: WAIT/NO_GO due to missing data layers and pre-CPI uncertainty.
